sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105884" key="tumbofa/nths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τυμβο-φάντης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n105884.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who shows a tomb, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.416</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
